title: EI Premium reduction guide - Canada.ca
content:
## EI Premium reduction guide
Official title: Reducing Your Employment Insurance (EI) Premiums program guide.

### Is this guide for you?
This guide is for you if you are an employer who provides your employees with a short-term disability plan. If your short-term disability plan meets certain requirements, you may be entitled to pay your Employment Insurance (EI) premiums at a rate lower than the standard employer rate of 1.4 times the employees’ EI premiums.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
